---
name: New template proposal
about: Propose a new format template for AIVC DACH
title: "[TEMPLATE] "
labels: template
assignees: ''
---

## Format name

e.g. "Quote Card", "Coming Soon Teaser", "Recipe Step", …

## Use case

What kind of video is this for? Who would use it?

## Length & aspect ratio

- Duration: ___ s
- Aspect ratio: 16:9 / 9:16 / 1:1 / 4:5 / 4:3
- Output resolution: ___ × ___

## Scenes

| # | From | To | Name | Description |
|---|------|----|------|-------------|
| 1 | 0 s  | …  | …    | …           |
| 2 | …    | …  | …    | …           |

## Variables

| Key | Label | Required | Example | Max length |
|-----|-------|----------|---------|------------|
| `EXAMPLE` | Display label | yes | "Hello" | 30 |

## Animation sketch

Describe the key animations (fade-in, slide, scale, color shift). A rough drawing or reference video link is great.

## Brand integration

Which CSS variables does it use? `--primary`, `--accent`, `--bg`, `--text`, `--font-heading`, …

## Are you willing to submit a PR yourself?

- [ ] Yes – I'll build it.
- [ ] Partially – I'll provide design / copy.
- [ ] No – I'm just suggesting.
